name: GST, ITC & MSME Compliance Audit Framework (FY 2025-26)
description: Professional CA audit checklist aligned with CGST Act, Rule 36(4), Section 17(5), E-Invoicing Rules and Section 43B(h) MSME compliance as applicable for FY 2025-26.

checks.focus: Verify mandatory particulars under Rule 46 of CGST Rules.
checks.rule: Invoice must contain: Supplier name, address, GSTIN (15 characters), Invoice number (unique), Date, Recipient GSTIN (15 characters for B2B), HSN/SAC code, taxable value, tax rate, tax amount (CGST/SGST/IGST), place of supply, signature.
GSTIN must follow format: 2-digit state code + 10-character PAN + 1 entity code + Z + 1 checksum. Flag if invalid.

checks.focus: Check applicability of e-invoicing as per latest CBIC turnover threshold.
checks.rule: For applicable taxpayers, invoice must contain valid 64-character IRN, IRP acknowledgement number, acknowledgement date, and QR code. Absence is a compliance breach.

ITC shall not be claimed for motor vehicles (passenger use), food & beverages, outdoor catering, beauty treatment, health services, club membership, works contract for immovable property (unless exceptions apply). Flag as ineligible ITC.
ITC can be claimed only if reflected in GSTR-2B. Flag mismatch risk.
Payment must be made within 45 days if written agreement exists, 15 days otherwise. Delayed payments disallowed as deduction under Section 43B(h).
GST rate must match HSN/SAC classification as per current GST rate notifications.
